hero.description: Master Solana development through interactive courses. Earn soulbound XP tokens and verifiable credential NFTs that live in your wallet forever.

features.heading: Why Superteam Academy
features.description: A learning platform built for the Solana ecosystem, where your achievements are as permanent as the blockchain.
features.interactiveCoursesDesc: Hands-on Solana development with in-browser coding challenges. Build real programs, not just watch videos.
features.onChainXpDesc: Earn soulbound Token-2022 XP for every lesson completed. Your progress is permanent and verifiable on Solana.
features.credentialNftsDesc: Receive Metaplex Core NFTs as proof of mastery. Soulbound credentials that upgrade as you advance through tracks.
features.decentralizedDesc: Course enrollments and completions recorded on-chain. No central authority controls your learning record.

learningPaths.heading: Learning Paths
learningPaths.description: Structured tracks from zero to deployed program. Each path awards XP and a credential NFT on completion.

footer.tagline: Solana-native learning platform with on-chain credentials.

courses.heading: Courses
courses.description: Structured learning paths from zero to deployed program. Each course awards XP and a credential NFT on completion.
courses.syllabusComingSoon: Lessons for this course are coming soon.

dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your learning progress at a glance.
dashboard.noEnrollments: You haven't enrolled in any courses yet.
dashboard.completeFirst: Complete a course to earn your first credential.

leaderboard.heading: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Top learners ranked by XP. Powered by on-chain Token-2022 balances via Helius DAS API.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.description: Your public profile — credentials, XP, and achievements.
profile.noActivity: No activity yet. Enroll in a course to get started.

settings.heading: Settings
settings.description: Language, theme, notifications, and wallet preferences.
settings.appearanceDesc: Customize the look and feel of the platform.
settings.walletConnectPrompt: Connect your Solana wallet to enroll in courses and earn XP.
settings.notificationsDesc: Choose what you want to be notified about.
settings.notifyNewCoursesDesc: Get notified when new courses are published.
settings.notifyStreakReminderDesc: Daily reminder to maintain your learning streak.
settings.notifyLeaderboardDesc: Get notified when your rank changes.

certificates.heading: Certificates
certificates.description: View and manage your earned credentials.
certificates.notFoundDesc: This credential does not exist or has not been issued yet.

lesson.noTests: No tests defined for this lesson
lesson.completeChallenge: Complete the coding challenge below. Write your solution in the editor and click "Run Code" to test.
lesson.readingPlaceholder: This is a reading lesson. Content would be loaded from CMS/Arweave.

onboarding.takingYou: Taking you to your personalized learning path...
onboarding.q1: How would you find the best Solana tutorial online?
onboarding.q1o4: Try building something and figure it out
onboarding.q2: You have 100 XP to spend. What do you pick?
onboarding.q4: What do you want to build?
